| | Tough re-elections are nothing new Peter. In 2012, special interest groups spent more than $40 million against us. They wanted me gone, and they weren't shy about spending money to make that happen. They called me the "Hunted Democrat." But Team Sherrod stepped up. We organized. We mobilized. And when the polls closed and all the votes were counted, we came out ahead. We're up against some tough challenges in this campaign, too. Trump's hand-picked candidate, Congressman Jim Renacci, is winning in his primary. There are new attack ads out against us. Trump's standing is on the rise in Ohio. He has visited the Buckeye state three times since Inauguration Day and is coming back _this Thursday._ [**_Just like in 2012, I need your help to come out ahead. Our first big FEC deadline is coming up in just 6 days. Can you match our $26 average online contribution and help us reach our $320,000 goal?_**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb6e/4462dc26/43d911dc/20006e9c/1502380608/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI1cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180325pm?refcode=sbe180325pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb6e/4462dc26/43d911dc/20006e93/1502380608/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI1cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180325pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180325pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb6e/4462dc26/43d911dc/20006e93/1502380608/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI1cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180325pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180325pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb6e/4462dc26/43d911dc/20006e93/1502380608/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI1cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180325pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180325pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb6e/4462dc26/43d911dc/20006e9c/1502380608/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI1cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180325pm?refcode=sbe180325pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** A lot has changed since 2012. name: The White House
subject: America first in space
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a7a6aaef31a38eb461c78b43bb46378d36d0a1aaeeb0f8463203d492a172282b37f5a729278b014bc4c2df7211d19654921761f8c2f0188

America first in space

Americans have long looked to the stars as a symbol of our Nation’s traditions of pioneering and exploration. Last week, President Donald J. Trump unveiled a National Space Strategy that works within his broader national security policy to put America’s interests first.

President Trump’s strategy harnesses the American spirit, laying the groundwork for the next generation of U.S. space exploration. Specifically, this new framework will:

- Allow the Government to partner with the commercial sector to ensure that American companies remain world leaders in space technology.
-
Build on the Administration’s National Security Strategy to emphasize peace through strength in the space domain.
-
Ensure that international space agreements put the interests of American people, workers, and businesses first.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a7a6aaef31a38eb705e88139663e51859321c8f52493601b084d86a3424d0a1c9077fecdccbdd1fb49cb8793b8511422563a0a479bda8ba
Learn more about the President’s strategy to make America a leader in space once more.

A bipartisan case for trade action

Last week, President Trump took action to address Chinese trade practices that are harming American businesses. In particular, the President directed his Administration to respond to the unfair and harmful Chinese acquisition of U.S. technology.

These actions prompted a wave of positive reactions, including from Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY):

“President Trump is exactly right this afternoon to propose a plan designed to punish China for its most flagrant trade abuses. I’ve called for such action for years and been disappointed by the inactions of both Presidents Bush and Obama. I’m very pleased that this Administration is taking strong action to get a better deal on China.”

“Under my Administration, the theft of American prosperity will end,” President Trump said. “We’re going to defend our industry and create a level playing field for the American worker—finally.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a7a6aaef31a38eb416c91816133079ea3fa4c8be5693bc837972d08764341e76abb3552d1c53b3ab306c3e4d84b19f7f6dc1ea7a014520b
Read more responses to President Trump’s tough actions against China here.

‘The cradle of Western civilization’

The President welcomed guests to the White House’s East Room last Thursday to celebrate Greek Independence Day. The Greek holiday commemorates the beginning of the War of Greek Independence in 1821.

“As the cradle of Western civilization and the birthplace of democracy, Greece has a rich and glorious heritage,” President Trump wrote in his
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a7a6aaef31a38eba69381547b1712628a0b40293a54c4f036efe6b65d160ad1510d7184cd4d91d8a4464853379a562e5fa5bc128b769f3d
Proclamation last week. “The ancient Greeks fostered the timeless ideal of human liberty, which inspired our Nation’s Founders as they drafted our Constitution and established our Republic.”

President Trump hosted Greek Prime Minister Alexis Tsipras at the White House last October for bilateral discussions.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a7a6aaef31a38eb75a15413e8065cf6f50a56aa80d24a9928774868cd76e8dd3506ee85ff384b082c0dc7e58bfcee50f3b377fc2e221cf0
The President hosts a Greek Independence Day Celebration at the White House

Photo of the Day

First Lady Melania Trump presents the International Women of Courage Award | March 23, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, after receiving his intelligence briefing, President Trump will have lunch with Vice President Mike Pence.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a7a6aaef31a38eb3802f81d0aff04f4753279a8093d69ca25112fb7ab20bb548a01293ebf0d2b843d04ccce31324290141c813115fec739
Privacy Policy |

Contact the White House |

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Did you see my note, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
This weekend we gave the gun lobby something to be worried about.
---
Derek, I wanted to make sure you saw my note over the weekend.

I am amazed by the energy I saw at the March for Our Lives events. There is no doubt in my mind that we can defeat the gun lobby this year -- but only if we carry that same energy to the polls in November.

**Split a $3 donation between Giffords PAC and the DNC if you're ready to elect candidates who have the courage to reject the gun lobby and strengthen our gun laws.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c5c/492785226/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c5d/492785226/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c5a/492785226/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c5b/492785226/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c58/492785226/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c59/492785226/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
** Thank you for being a part of our movement to end gun violence.

Gabby Giffords

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
Sender: Gabby Giffords
Sent: Sat, Mar 24, 2018
Subject: I need your help to take on the gun lobby

Today we are giving the gun lobby something to be worried about.

At more than 800 events, our movement is taking a powerful stand against gun violence. We're showing that we will not accept horrific acts of violence as routine -- and if Congress won't act, then American voters will.

We can end the cycle of gun violence -- but it will only happen if we continue organizing to take on the gun lobby. So I am asking you today:

**Split a $3 donation between Giffords PAC and the DNC to defeat the gun lobby in November. It's time to elect candidates who will make our communities safer from gun violence.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c7e/492785226/VEsDAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=55+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c7f/492785226/VEsDAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=56+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c7c/492785226/VEsDAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=57+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c7d/492785226/VEsDDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=58+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c7a/492785226/VEsDDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=59+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c7b/492785226/VEsABQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=60+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")
** The gun lobby is fully committed to defending their deadly agenda, no matter what the cost. They are prepared to spend tens of millions of dollars this year -- all to elect candidates who will stall efforts on gun violence prevention legislation.

This year we must match their commitment with our own. We must remember that we are not hopeless in the fight to end gun violence -- and our collective power at marches nationwide today proves that.

**If our current leaders do not have the courage to act on gun violence, then it's up to us to elect candidates who will.**

I am going to work tirelessly this year to defeat politicians who are funded by the gun lobby -- and today I am counting on you to join me.

**[Split a $3 donation between Giffords PAC and the DNC today. Your contribution will help end gun violence and save lives.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c78/492785226/VEsABA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=61+-+Split+a+if+consinConsGroup29378+nother+e&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd")**

All my best,

Gabby Giffords

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c79/492785226/VEsABw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=62+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c06/492785226/VEsABg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=63+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c07/492785226/VEsAAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=64+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522550/4067b0a/5256e32b6/7e4a6c04/492785226/VEsAAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=65+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180326_gg_nd&source=em_20180326_gg_nd&refcode=em_20180326_gg_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Asking for a quick favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

Can I ask a favor? We're just days away from the first FEC fundraising deadline of 2018, and I want to make sure that my friend Tim Kaine can post the fundraising numbers he needs to win in November and keep up the great work he is doing for Virginia in the Senate. [Will you join me in supporting Tim by making a donation of any amount today? >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0BU2Wjlh%2BDJm6YphGisjUaj4MRJq542i)

Tim has set a goal of 10,000 individual small-dollar donations to make sure his campaign is powered by people, not the special interests. To me, this embodies Tim and the kind of campaign he runs.

Tim and his team are building a campaign that will strengthen Virginia's grassroots democratic network and raise up all the other Democratic candidates we'll see in November. After the incredible turnout and energy in Virginia's 2017 elections, we need to carry that momentum all the way to Election Day 2018 if we're going to keep Virginia blue and keep Tim in the Senate.

[But as someone who has run my fair share of campaigns, I know it takes money to run a winning campaign that supports Democrats up and down the ballot. Will you pitch in today to help re-elect Tim to the Senate and keep Virginia blue? >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FTvxC8T2yg0T5ByAMlpc86j4MRJq542i)

There's no one I'd rather be fighting alongside in the Senate than my friend of over 30 years, Tim Kaine. Let's make sure he has the resources he needs to win in November and keep up the fight.

Thanks for having Tim's back,

_Mark Warner_

P.S. Will you help me surprise Tim by raising 300 of the donations he needs to hit his milestone from this email? [Click here to donate whatever amount you feel comfortable with >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2B3vxl73LI8IO%2BtjTXyyZP6j4MRJq542i)

name: [FOLLOW UP] via Team Kaine
subject: Update from Mark Warner (read + respond)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, Mark Warner emailed you because we are _less than one week away_ from the first major public filing deadline of the year - [donations for 2018 to date will be public information.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=sS%2BhhfxEB3j9oiZDaMyaekKbc5T26f8m)

Mark knows how important it is to not only keep Tim in the Senate in November, but also to make sure we are showing we have strong early support right now. **The best way to do this is to show we are 10,000 strong for online donations.**

We have raised 281 grassroots donations and counting from Mark's email alone! But we still have over 1,000 to go to be able to post our remarkable 10,000 grassroots number. [So we're attaching Mark's note again, will you give it a read if you skipped it previously and chip in a small amount to count towards our goal? >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=NNdH%2BejsCV4n1no85lo4wEKbc5T26f8m)

Thanks so much!

_Team Kaine_

\-------ORIGINAL MESSAGE-------

**FROM: Mark Warner
SUBJECT: Asking for a quick favor**

Derek,

Can I ask a favor? We're just days away from the first FEC fundraising deadline of 2018, and I want to make sure that my friend Tim Kaine can post the fundraising numbers he needs to win in November and keep up the great work he is doing for Virginia in the Senate. [Will you join me in supporting Tim by making a donation of any amount today? >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=LMf2CMNT1EU7CsWBdxNqFkKbc5T26f8m)

Tim has set a goal of 10,000 individual small-dollar donations to make sure his campaign is powered by people, not the special interests. To me, this embodies Tim and the kind of campaign he runs.

Tim and his team are building a campaign that will strengthen Virginia's grassroots democratic network and raise up all the other Democratic candidates we'll see in November. After the incredible turnout and energy in Virginia's 2017 elections, we need to carry that momentum all the way to Election Day 2018 if we're going to keep Virginia blue and keep Tim in the Senate.

[But as someone who has run my fair share of campaigns, I know it takes money to run a winning campaign that supports Democrats up and down the ballot. Will you pitch in today to help re-elect Tim to the Senate and keep Virginia blue? >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5BXvbaeQht8%2FLo7uxCcOSUKbc5T26f8m)

There's no one I'd rather be fighting alongside in the Senate than my friend of over 30 years, Tim Kaine. Let's make sure he has the resources he needs to win in November and keep up the fight.

Thanks for having Tim's back,

_Mark Warner_

P.S. Will you help me surprise Tim by raising 300 of the donations he needs to hit his milestone from this email? [Click here to donate whatever amount you feel comfortable with >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ENFC8cBB7DgEr3pw9UDLu0Kbc5T26f8m)

body:
#
Friends,
Last week, Senator Kamala Harris joined the growing list of progressive champions who have endorsed our campaign! I'm grateful to receive Senator Harris' support as we continue building a movement to get Maryland back to doing big things again.
**[I'm ready to propel Maryland families forward as your next governor. Will you join Kamala in supporting our campaign with a donation of $5?](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a773/7ab0e2c4/7f5405b0/349a789f/2726934791/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDMyNjhDIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st3-18?refcode=OHQ03268C")**
Senator Harris has fought for working families across the nation, including the fight to protect the millions of DACA-eligible DREAMers across our country, 34,000 of whom live in Maryland.
I'm thankful for her support and proud to have her as an ally as we build a broad, diverse coalition committed to getting our schools back to number one, passing Medicare for All, enacting a $15 minimum wage, achieving criminal justice reform, and further advancing the rights of DREAMers in our state.
Democrats are the heirs to the politics of Robert F. Kennedy and Martin Luther King Jr., Shirley Chisholm, and Barbara Mikulski. Great people who understood that we must build robust, intersectional movements to move the dial in this country and in our state.
I'm ready to do that as your next governor.
**[Help me move this state and bring progressive politics back to Maryland. Donate $5 today!](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a773/7ab0e2c4/7f5405b0/349a789f/2726934791/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDMyNjhDIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st3-18?refcode=OHQ03268C")**
Together, we can build a real movement that ensures we have a government with the courage to address real problems in real time.
Onward,
Ben

clean_body: Friends, Last week, Senator Kamala Harris joined the growing list of progressive champions who have endorsed our campaign! I'm grateful to receive Senator Harris' support as we continue building a movement to get Maryland back to doing big things again. "" Senator Harris has fought for working families across the nation, including the fight to protect the millions of DACA-eligible DREAMers across our country, 34,000 of whom live in Maryland. I'm thankful for her support and proud to have her as an ally as we build a broad, diverse coalition committed to getting our schools back to number one, passing Medicare for All, enacting a $15 minimum wage, achieving criminal justice reform, and further advancing the rights of DREAMers in our state. Democrats are the heirs to the politics of Robert F. Kennedy and Martin Luther King Jr., Shirley Chisholm, and Barbara Mikulski. Great people who understood that we must build robust, intersectional movements to move the dial in this country and in our state. I'm ready to do that as your next governor. "" Together, we can build a real movement that ensures we have a government with the courage to address real problems in real time. Onward, Ben **** ""** PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

| | During my last run for re-election, the special interests threw everything and the kitchen sink at us. They spent $40 million against me. They ran attack ads on radio, TV, and the internet. They boosted my opponent's campaign. It got so bad, the press called me the "Hunted Democrat." None of their attacks stopped us. We won. **All thanks to the strong grassroots network we built together.** We beat back the dark money from groups backed by the likes of the Koch brothers and Karl Rove. We raised money to pay for volunteer equipment, yard signs, Get Out the Vote efforts, and everything we needed to run a winning campaign. We worked hard all the way through Election Day, and we came out ahead. **We need that same effort now.** President Trump's standing is on the rise in Ohio -- and he's coming back to the state this Thursday. His preferred candidate, Congressman Jim Renacci, has a massive lead in his primary. [**_The end of March is also the end of the first FEC quarter of the Election Year, and we face every challenge that comes our way with an average online contribution of $26. subject: [March goal] our mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Election 2018 is heating up this month, and now we have fewer than 50 days until Primary Election Day. I’ve been criss-crossing the Sixth District... | | |
---|---|---
|
---
**Election 2018 is heating up this month, and now we have fewer than 50 days until Primary Election Day.**

I’ve been criss-crossing the Sixth District every week talking with Sixth District Hoosiers about how I’ll always represent conservative Hoosier values and fight alongside President Trump to Make America Great Again.

_In every community I visit, I can sense that our conservative, Hoosier-First grassroots support is stronger than ever._

**[Donate any amount to help me fight for our conservative Hoosier priorities and the Trump-Pence Make America Great Again agenda >>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=ff44d9a1768c4e82b548bf88176e8dc0&_e=kKheZJOi3BGEdVuSOSuna9lp_0IuX2zSBKaIexEekY0LTut2Wl6Ur-pSP39MSoQYYwl11evbA_hPRCvT5I7rkJgXiVDMpUwcowkc_N7eouTuloR-FcXtNkbw652m36SumXVr0Ldd_DbolzBVVpkr8PKoB28MLy1BKgEz6SG_h6G-776-OOn_TxkKuzWMGCo133rbHC4KW_ffc8m3VoBs8zEjCqjEsYjkmZK6tXrspTCU8YDvghXC3hhnfZK7UFoIEt4U6SYvIIbch93D4b02hi04dZS3qozqJ49LHWG8NsDNq6QyCbXHee3Q9wN6i1IV7xn7A1Y2V_oR8lwuK8F1e_R1ar3bkG1e18FKiJrA_4hZQaRsl9dK5yy3V8VKynC1IkYeGT6PPNzs6JIEHyYsT8mEJZ0NOuyvNAdD1uyzUpM%3D)**

Before we close the books on what has been a busy month, we are up against a major moment in my campaign – **our quarterly FEC-mandated deadline.**

This is our last quarterly deadline before Primary Election Day, and that’s why our campaign has set a big goal. Our goal is to raise **$25,000** and we only have 5 days to do it.
|
---
**Let’s Make America Great Again**
**User ID: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=ff44d9a1768c4e82b548bf88176e8dc0&_e=kKheZJOi3BGEdVuSOSuna9lp_0IuX2zSBKaIexEekY0LTut2Wl6Ur-pSP39MSoQYYwl11evbA_hPRCvT5I7rkJgXiVDMpUwcowkc_N7eouTuloR-FcXtNkbw652m36SumXVr0Ldd_DbolzBVVpkr8PKoB28MLy1BKgEz6SG_h6G-776-OOn_TxkKuzWMGCo133rbHC4KW_ffc8m3VoBs8_GztjGEhNtwxeGf1GXWyqPIs7-hL6kO-IAs2yYsZ7Jk_CCKy9wXNlzXGlmXV41GZS38s4j7WhFIgkQas3HnDRzjNGS2wyRpE57nCMQdL6qs9O4hqjlUjs-L240GHc_Mp25wlumhyY9p0t-xiPuuS0KVvQLA42CUpzwvvEq8hH9J9mnrNWmQuj6Hvg0y5xOo8p3Bk1HVczV0FvmabZZMgqI%3D)**
**Goal: $25,000**
[ **Donate $12** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=ff44d9a1768c4e82b548bf88176e8dc0&_e=kKheZJOi3BGEdVuSOSuna9lp_0IuX2zSBKaIexEekY0LTut2Wl6Ur-pSP39MSoQYA4Iczpfkqsza5q-1me85gzC7rVbSFpImFto157zRp7t974mvQXwhsFPCtffT5u8byiMjBiltVYx4SKwhtr6h6i6bR9i2xBat_vApHLDJq4Z0N2zwEuvpruecbuXjyiFW-b5XHuqUXskHwlSbyYzwmEzwAk2QYrFH-a6D0PF5EFDf1p3hMHLsZSCUGMN2HE3njchp-REsNYxYrUZN0mMQtgQ2tcWBOvtI1o2GTgQfGUlg8Rf2F5SvCpc9ObOukR4xOuef93b2E2j5n0T7lY2nwaGJ0YYCAMJ7f3bxB2fkOVhMWBpWeLnBRDgmqG1lhG_kDlFpLtlj2SN3kp1FlmjwkrtDnmru6TzaCTA6__L1Lrxxpz21RR1Om8dt8uSCYDzK)
|
---
It doesn’t matter how big a task is – a Marine’s mission is to succeed. _Failure is not an option._

No one said it would be easy, but I’m up for this challenge. Are you?

[**I’m Ready to Serve, Again! – Help us beat our March End of Quarter Fundraising Goal and keep our momentum surging >>**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=ff44d9a1768c4e82b548bf88176e8dc0&_e=kKheZJOi3BGEdVuSOSuna9lp_0IuX2zSBKaIexEekY0LTut2Wl6Ur-pSP39MSoQYYwl11evbA_hPRCvT5I7rkJgXiVDMpUwcowkc_N7eouTuloR-FcXtNkbw652m36SumXVr0Ldd_DbolzBVVpkr8PKoB28MLy1BKgEz6SG_h6G-776-OOn_TxkKuzWMGCo133rbHC4KW_ffc8m3VoBs859lav1z17ND4Q4iwOkbmWb-EReWKnHqQwcxCzK7SpFH7OBl56DCNBzBavtBGVTrR85p7yo6EAdSQd1gFLlJq-9AE73bJZaV5WXIUB9qm7RgwcFtoKdGrEzcv1fXEGMBnXPAvnYwE2GzZHGYJ6ybDh24qwvxxdqiNES0HLeSzCUKh525uhACkjQ7BusewHHN941Sgp34jTI4-w93AUBMH3g%3D)

Earlier this month, I saw firsthand the enthusiasm of Team Pence grassroots volunteers, who have donated their time to spreading our Hoosiers & America First message, during our first Super Saturday event.

YOUR Hoosier priorities are MY priorities, and while I’m busy on the campaign trail, I’m reminded of what I’m fighting for – our conservative Hoosier values.

**[Will you stand with me for our conservative Hoosier values by donating any amount?](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=ff44d9a1768c4e82b548bf88176e8dc0&_e=kKheZJOi3BGEdVuSOSuna9lp_0IuX2zSBKaIexEekY0LTut2Wl6Ur-pSP39MSoQYYwl11evbA_hPRCvT5I7rkJgXiVDMpUwcowkc_N7eouTuloR-FcXtNkbw652m36SumXVr0Ldd_DbolzBVVpkr8PKoB28MLy1BKgEz6SG_h6G-776-OOn_TxkKuzWMGCo133rbHC4KW_ffc8m3VoBs8181nqp8jXlkAntMeirq-ylKlPfnIprCwSDWuNOvj8Tc3DwpXqBIwyfMk5m_m0xDHlytIvzol5rl8X8KZS5CCS180k2JX1bw_Hsm5rUV43QoYz84yBF9wg3--cQDt1i8pNifHJO_yLQCSqNOJPSte4QOR9Fd-7A1szT86EhHIoQWq8cVcLlgOmFJReNZspl8qGHL28UQH533Xt67Ym6a9vY%3D)**

I’m Ready to Serve, Again!
Greg Pence

**P.S. We only have five days until midnight on March 31st to hit our $25,000 March End of Quarter Fundraising Goal to keep up our momentum and continue fighting for Hoosier values.**

subject: America's veterans deserve better

body:
| [](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc04c39/7da2b91d/5ce0b320/5c66a9a5/203820706/VEsH/ "http://www.stackforpa.com")
---

| | As a candidate, Donald Trump made grand promises to improve life for veterans. But now that he's in the White House, he's all but forgotten the men and women who have served -even naming warmongering Ambassador John Bolton as his National Security Advisor. **_Mr. President, a military parade in Washington, D.C., designed to stroke your ego, and warmongers in the Oval Office do not fulfill your promises to veterans in Pennsylvania and across the nation._** As Lieutenant Governor and as a Captain in the Pennsylvania National Guard, I've been privileged to work alongside veterans. **They represent the best of our nation. But the country they served is letting them down.** Veteran unemployment is higher than the national average. And too many former service members face medical challenges, food and housing insecurity, and substance abuse problems. We can do so much more to ensure that veterans returning to civilian life can find good-paying jobs, education opportunities, and utilize every benefit they earned through service. That's why, as Lieutenant Governor, I work every day to honor the veterans who have sacrificed so much for our nation's safety and security. We can do more, and you can bet I'll keep up the fight to support our veterans. **[Tell our nation's veterans we care. Chip in $7 towards our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc04c39/7da2b91d/5ce0b320/5c66a9a4/203820706/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?refcode=2018-03-26-veterans&recurring=1&amount=7")** **_Mike_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc04c39/7da2b91d/5ce0b320/5c66a9ab/203820706/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2018-03-26-veterans&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc04c39/7da2b91d/5ce0b320/5c66a9aa/203820706/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2018-03-26-veterans&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc04c39/7da2b91d/5ce0b320/5c66a9a9/203820706/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2018-03-26-veterans&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc04c39/7da2b91d/5ce0b320/5c66a9a8/203820706/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2018-03-26-veterans&refcode2=express-buttons")

| | | **FOX NEWS: Indiana Senate Race "LEANS REPUBLICAN"
[Pitch in now to help us fight back >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c23b5/7377f838/317a597c/51fa9e65/2500960364/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-senateupdate?refcode=20180326.2nd&amount=10")**

**Have you seen this, Peter?**

Fox News said the Indiana Senate race "leans Republican." **Fox News thinks that _Joe is the most vulnerable Democrat in the country_ \-- they think it's the GOP's race to win.**

Not only that, but they're signaling to special interests across the country that now's the time to pour millions into Indiana. From our experience, we know they answer the call -- and the stream of dark money already coming into the state will become a flood.

We need to be able to respond when rankings like this come out, Peter. **The ads and attacks are coming -- and we have to be ready. Will you pitch in to help us hit back?**
